# open62541 OPC UA 客户端库（单文件分发版 v1.5.5）
# 编译选项通过 target_compile_definitions 控制 UA_ENABLE_* 开关
add_library(open62541 STATIC
    open62541.c
)
target_include_directories(open62541 PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})
target_compile_definitions(open62541 PUBLIC
    UA_ENABLE_CLIENT=1
    UA_ENABLE_SUBSCRIPTIONS=1
    UA_ENABLE_SUBSCRIPTIONS_EVENTS=0
    UA_ENABLE_NODELIST=1
    UA_ENABLE_ENCRYPTION=0
    UA_ENABLE_METHODCALLS=0
    UA_ENABLE_PUBSUB=0
    UA_ENABLE_PUBSUB_DELTAFRAMES=0
    UA_ENABLE_PUBSUB_INFORMATIONMODEL=0
    UA_ENABLE_HISTORIZING=0
    UA_ENABLE_JSON_ENCODING=0
    UA_ENABLE_XML_ENCODING=0
    UA_ENABLE_DETERMINISTIC_RANDOM=0
    UA_MULTITHREADING=0
)
